PROP-baseauction-post-001.text: After bid() settles, contract must hold transferred assetOut and bidder must hold transferred asset.
PROP-baseauction-post-001.assertion: post bid: bidder.balance(asset) += amount AND contract.balance(assetOut) += assetOutAmount

locations.note: Both transfers happen inside bid(); safeTransfer (asset to bidder) then safeTransferFrom (assetOut from bidder)
